hero.description: KRISHI SAARTHI brings the power of large language models to every farmer and field supervisor.
hero.userQuery: My wheat leaves are turning yellow at the edges. What's wrong?
hero.aiResponse: This looks like Potassium deficiency. Apply MOP at 30 kg/acre.

features.title: Everything a Field Supervisor Needs
features.description: From AI-powered chat to detailed field analytics — KRISHI SAARTHI covers every dimension of modern precision agriculture.

aiCropAdvisor.title: AI Crop Advisor :
aiCropAdvisor.description: Ask anything about your crops in plain language. Our LLM-powered assistant gives you expert-level guidance — from sowing to harvest.

pestDetection.title: Pest & Disease Detection
pestDetection.description: Describe symptoms or upload an image. KRISHI SAARTHI identifies threats and recommends precise, actionable treatments.

soilInsights.title: Soil Health Insights
soilInsights.description: Understand your soil composition, pH levels, and fertility status. Get tailored fertilizer and amendment recommendations.

yieldAnalytics.title: Yield Analytics
yieldAnalytics.description: Track crop performance season over season. Visualize yield trends and get AI-driven suggestions to maximise output.

about.description: KRISHI SAARTHI is an AI-powered agricultural assistant designed to bring expert farming knowledge to every field in India. Born from a need to bridge the gap between cutting-edge AI and grassroots agriculture, we serve farmers, field supervisors, and agri-entrepreneurs across Uttarakhand and beyond.

rootedInAgriculture.title: Rooted in Agriculture
rootedInAgriculture.description: Trained on deep agronomic knowledge spanning India's diverse crop varieties, soil types, and regional farming practices.

farmerFirstDesign.title: Farmer-First Design
farmerFirstDesign.description: Conversational, multilingual, and intuitive — built so any farmer can get expert guidance without any technical background.

aiActsFast.title: AI That Acts Fast
aiActsFast.description: Powered by state-of-the-art LLMs, KRISHI SAARTHI delivers instant, contextual recommendations right when you need them most.

trustedTransparent.title: Trusted & Transparent
trustedTransparent.description: Every recommendation is grounded in verified agricultural science — farmer safety and accuracy always come first.

howItWorks.step1Body: Tell the AI about your crop type, location, and current conditions in plain language — no technical forms required.
howItWorks.step2Body: Receive precise, context-aware guidance powered by state-of-the-art LLM models trained on agronomic knowledge.
howItWorks.step3Body: Implement suggestions in the field and log outcomes. Your data continuously improves future recommendations.

cta.description: Join thousands of farmers and field supervisors using AI to make smarter, faster decisions — season after season.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Krishi Saarthi. Empowering Indian Agriculture with AI.

chatbot.aiInitialGreeting: Namaste! 🌿 I'm Krishi AI, your intelligent field assistant. Describe your crop issue, upload a field photo, or ask anything about soil, pests, or weather — I'm here to help.
chatbot.aiFollowUpText: Thank you for the details. Based on your description, I'm analysing the symptoms. Could you also share the current weather conditions in your area and the last irrigation date?
chatbot.newConsultationStarted: New consultation started. What crop issue can I help you with today?
chatbot.placeholder: Describe your crop issue or upload a photo...
chatbot.disclaimer: Krishi AI may make mistakes. Verify critical advice with a certified agronomist.

signIn.title: Sign In
signIn.description: Welcome back! Access your smart farm companion.
signIn.otpSentMessage: OTP sent to your mobile number!
